programme.title: Khoya Khoya Chand
programme.desc: A period drama about the lives, love, and struggles of actors in the Hindi film industry of the 1950s.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: When a girl becomes a victim of acid attack, her mild-mannered brother Dev is enraged. He takes the law in his own hands to teach a lesson not only to her attacker but also to those who victimised other girls in the past in a similar manner.

programme.title: Wedding Anniversary
programme.desc: Kahani plans a getaway in Goa to celebrate her marriage anniversary with her husband. But he gets caught up in work and she is left alone on the special day. Her night, however, takes a drastic turn when a mysterious guest arrives to accompany her.

programme.title: Bollywood Movie
programme.desc: The Movie Club provides Bollywood films, popular Indian movies, and general entertainment programming.
